response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Successfully matched the reference lyrics for 'G4L' with some minor structural adjustments to fit vocal phrasing. For 'CR詠ZY', the reference JSON contained Chinese translations of the lyrics; therefore, 100% manual transcription was used to capture the actual Japanese vocal performance. 2. JSON Usage: Fully utilized for 'G4L' reference and disambiguation. Discarded the mismatched lyrics for 'CR詠ZY' and performed manual transcription. 3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitles are precisely anchored to vocal boundaries. Added an on-screen title subtitle for 'CR詠ZY' during the instrumental dance segment between 03:19 and 03:22. Used instantaneous transitions (e.g., Line 1 'e' equals Line 2 's') to avoid cascading delays in fast-paced vocal sequences.

subtitles.original: あれが正解なんて
subtitles.english: That's supposed to be the correct answer?

subtitles.original: 誰の成れの果て？
subtitles.english: Whose ruined end is that?

subtitles.original: なんだっての悶々々
subtitles.english: What's with this agonizing...

subtitles.original: 答えも欲しいのも一個てこれだけ
subtitles.english: There's only one answer I want, and it's just this.

subtitles.original: 悩んだってしょうがないじゃんね
subtitles.english: It's no use worrying about it, right?

subtitles.original: あれは夢だったって思うことにしたって
subtitles.english: Even if I try to convince myself it was just a dream...

subtitles.original: （つらｗ）でも全然思えないんだけど
subtitles.english: (Painful, lol) But I can't think of it that way at all.

subtitles.original: 助けてよフォロワー！抗うだけ
subtitles.english: Help me, followers! I'll just keep resisting.

subtitles.original: 若さに負け next, next, lucky, lucky, lucky
subtitles.english: Losing to youth, next, next, lucky, lucky, lucky.

subtitles.original: アーリーオ 割り切れなったらさ
subtitles.english: Ah-ree-oh, if I could just divide it cleanly...

subtitles.original: オーリーオ 楽なのにとか
subtitles.english: Oh-ree-oh, it would be so much easier...

subtitles.original: あぁ もうヤダ！
subtitles.english: Ah, I've had enough of this!

subtitles.original: なんという新世界か！
subtitles.english: What kind of new world is this!

subtitles.original: あなた以外は
subtitles.english: Anyone other than you...

subtitles.original: あなた以外はいらない ない ない
subtitles.english: Anyone other than you, I don't need, need, need!

subtitles.original: はらないでよバリア
subtitles.english: Don't put up a barrier!

subtitles.original: あるはずなの何か
subtitles.english: There must be something there...

subtitles.original: あったならば happy, jumpin', yeah
subtitles.english: If there is, happy, jumpin', yeah!

subtitles.original: あなたのその手と
subtitles.english: Your hand...

subtitles.original: あたしのこの手を
subtitles.english: ...and my hand.

subtitles.original: つないだら もう二度と離さないわ
subtitles.english: If we hold hands, I'll never let go again.

subtitles.original: あなたのその手が
subtitles.english: If your hand...

subtitles.original: あたしのこの手を
subtitles.english: ...grabs my hand...

subtitles.original: 掴んだら... 以後お見知りおきを！ my love ♡
subtitles.english: ...well, pleased to make your acquaintance, my love!

subtitles.original: これで終わりなんて
subtitles.english: That this is the end...

subtitles.original: アガれないままなんて
subtitles.english: ...without even getting hyped up?

subtitles.original: どうにかなっちゃえって願って願って
subtitles.english: Praying and praying for something to happen.

subtitles.original: ねぇ 朝帰りしたりしちゃわん？どう？
subtitles.english: Hey, wanna stay out all night? What do you say?

subtitles.original: なあ もう我慢できん！ pain, pain
subtitles.english: Ah, I can't stand it anymore! Pain, pain.

subtitles.original: 痛いってば everyday
subtitles.english: I'm saying it hurts everyday!

subtitles.original: ま ゆーていけるけどな
subtitles.english: Well, I mean, I can handle it though.

subtitles.original: ブルベ夏なんで関係ないな
subtitles.english: I'm a cool summer type, so it doesn't matter.

subtitles.original: 誰よりもネコ
subtitles.english: More of a cat than anyone else.

subtitles.original: 節操ないも結構
subtitles.english: Having no morals is perfectly fine.

subtitles.original: あーしはあーしだ
subtitles.english: I am who I am.

subtitles.original: 見といてよready
subtitles.english: Keep your eyes on me, ready?

subtitles.original: もう今日で終わらせたいなって
subtitles.english: I want to end it all today...

subtitles.original: リスタートできたらって
subtitles.english: ...if only I could get a restart.

subtitles.original: でも無理よ もう
subtitles.english: But it's impossible, already!

subtitles.original: what's on your mind?
subtitles.english: What's on your mind?

subtitles.original: [曲名: CR詠ZY]
subtitles.english: [Song: CR詠ZY]

subtitles.original: Break away, Break away 細胞レベル
subtitles.english: Break away, break away, on a cellular level.

subtitles.original: あのユニフォーム着こなせてる？
subtitles.english: Can you pull off that uniform?

subtitles.original: 姿 仕草 そこそこでしょ
subtitles.english: Your figure and gestures are just so-so, aren't they?

subtitles.original: Don't you think? Don't you think?
subtitles.english: Don't you think? Don't you think?

subtitles.original: I'm so lazy 多分トップファイブ
subtitles.english: I'm so lazy, probably top five.

subtitles.original: そんな並べてるだけの人
subtitles.english: Just a person standing in line like that.

subtitles.original: Crash, crash, toss away
subtitles.english: Crash, crash, toss away.

subtitles.original: Don't you think? Don't you think?
subtitles.english: Don't you think? Don't you think?

subtitles.original: In this world この頭には
subtitles.english: In this world, in this head of mine...

subtitles.original: What a beautiful 散る花びら
subtitles.english: What a beautiful scattering of petals.

subtitles.original: バラライカのみたいな
subtitles.english: Just like a balalaika.

subtitles.original: らりらりらった らりら
subtitles.english: Lari lari latta lari la.

subtitles.original: 誰もが偉大
subtitles.english: Everyone is great.

subtitles.original: C-R-A-Z-Y
subtitles.english: C-R-A-Z-Y!

subtitles.original: 一瞬の感情に
subtitles.english: In a fleeting emotion...

subtitles.original: Ride on, Ride on, Ride on, Ride on
subtitles.english: Ride on, ride on, ride on, ride on!

subtitles.original: 心は ninety-five
subtitles.english: My heart is at ninety-five.

subtitles.original: 狂気のサムライ
subtitles.english: A crazy samurai.

subtitles.original: 血走る生存線でいくライフ
subtitles.english: Going through life on a bloodshot lifeline...

subtitles.original: Ready to die
subtitles.english: Ready to die!

subtitles.original: HELLO 陽は昇り あなたの空 まっ暗な空
subtitles.english: HELLO, the sun is rising, but your sky is pitch black.

subtitles.original: 荒々しく弾く響き ちぎって
subtitles.english: Tearing apart the roughly played echoes.

subtitles.original: ほら その場所で 聴こえてくる鼓動の仕掛け
subtitles.english: Look, at that place, the mechanism of the beating heart you can hear.

subtitles.original: 轟くのは己の調べ 誰のものでもない 己の調べ
subtitles.english: What roars is my own melody, belonging to no one else, my own melody!

subtitles.original: Rat-tat-tat, rat-tat-tat
subtitles.english: Rat-tat-tat, rat-tat-tat.

subtitles.original: 目の前に広がる世界はブルー
subtitles.english: The world spreading before my eyes is blue.

subtitles.original: ひとまずさあ MOVE
subtitles.english: For now, let's MOVE.

subtitles.original: Tick-tack, tick-tack, there's no need 何そんな張り切って偉そうに
subtitles.english: Tick-tack, tick-tack, there's no need, why are you so eagerly acting high and mighty?

subtitles.original: あぁ 君も愛を 右も左も
subtitles.english: Ah, you too, love, left and right...

subtitles.original: 知りもしないで言わないで Don't you think? Don't you think?
subtitles.english: Don't talk without even knowing, don't you think? Don't you think?

subtitles.original: にやり 影が笑う
subtitles.english: Grinning, the shadow laughs.

subtitles.original: 世界は異様
subtitles.english: The world is bizarre!

subtitles.original: C-R-A-Z-Y
subtitles.english: C-R-A-Z-Y!

subtitles.original: 繰り返すよう
subtitles.english: It seems to repeat...

subtitles.original: Ride on, Ride on, Ride on, Ride on
subtitles.english: Ride on, ride on, ride on, ride on!

subtitles.original: 分かってもいない
subtitles.english: You don't even understand.

subtitles.original: あの子のようと...
subtitles.english: Like that girl...
